Format the aliased-levels note for the comparison print methods

Source: R/comparison_helpers.R
aliased_note.Rd

Shared by print.mct(), print.pairwise_comparisons() and print.reference_comparisons() so all three report aliasing identically. Returns NULL when nothing was aliased. The levels are listed when there are few; once there are more than 6 the list is collapsed to a count (to avoid a large block) and the user is shown how to retrieve them from the aliased attribute.

Usage

aliased_note(aliased)

Arguments

aliased

Character vector of aliased level labels (or NULL).

Value

A single-line character string, or NULL.

On this page
